meta.title: StoreApp AI — Sales Automation Platform
meta.description: StoreApp AI — a 24/7 AI assistant on Facebook Messenger, Instagram, Telegram, Viber and WhatsApp. Automated orders, appointment booking, online payments, and inventory management.
meta.og_description: 24/7 AI assistant. Facebook, Instagram, Telegram, Viber, WhatsApp + automated orders, appointments, payments, inventory.
meta.twitter_description: 24/7 AI assistant — Facebook, Instagram, Telegram, Viber, WhatsApp.

hero.desc_html: StoreApp AI automates your business sales 24/7 across Facebook Messenger, Instagram, Telegram, Website, Viber, and WhatsApp.

chat_demo.msg_welcome: Good to see you! Welcome to our store.
chat_demo.msg_question: Do you have the iPhone 15 Pro?

features.desc: Chat, orders, inventory, payments, appointments, reports — manage every module your business needs from a single platform.
features.f01_desc: Powered by OpenAI GPT-4, our chat assistant studies your product catalog and answers customer questions with real, professional responses.
features.f02_desc: Facebook Messenger, Instagram, Telegram, Viber, WhatsApp, website — connect to 6 channels at once.
features.f03_desc: Collect name, phone, and delivery address in a structured way, and create orders automatically.
features.f04_desc: HiPay integration — once an order is confirmed, the payment link is sent through chat instantly.
features.f05_desc: Track stock levels in real time and send automatic alerts when items reach the low-stock threshold.
features.f06_desc: Filter revenue, sales, and order reports by date and export to PDF or Excel.
features.f07_desc: Register services, staff, and working hours so customers can self-book through chat.
features.f08_desc: Powered by Google Vision AI — read receipt photos and convert them into Excel report format automatically.
features.f09_desc: Owner, editor, seller, viewer — register staff with 4 permission levels and control actions per role with fine granularity.

industries.desc: Retail, services, healthcare — across every industry, automate AI chat, ordering, appointments, inventory and payments together in one place.
industries.beauty_desc: Hair salons, beauty salons, massage studios
industries.auto_desc: Spare parts, repair services, car wash
industries.more_desc: A flexible system that adapts to every small and medium business — share your needs with us.

viewer.desc: Staff, managers, and owners only need to open Telegram or Messenger on their phone. No computer or special software required.
viewer.quote: "Whether the owner is abroad or the warehouse staff is in the countryside, everyone gets information in real time"
viewer.tg_msg_inv_summary_html: 15 items · 🟢 13 in stock 🔴 2 out

booking.desc: An automated appointment system designed for clinics, beauty salons, and consulting businesses.
booking.ben1_desc: When customers type "book an appointment" in Messenger or Telegram, available times are shown automatically.
booking.ben2_desc: Set working hours, breaks, and time off for each doctor or specialist individually.
booking.ben3_title: Manage all bookings in one place
booking.ben3_desc: Move every booking through pending → confirmed → completed status seamlessly.
booking.ben4_desc: Get notified in the seller dashboard for each new booking. Customers are reminded 24 hours in advance.

quote.desc: When a customer sends a product list as Excel or CSV, AI automatically recognizes items, checks inventory, and prepares a quote in table format.
quote.step1_desc: The customer attaches a .xlsx or .csv file directly through Messenger or Telegram. No special format required.
quote.step2_desc: AI searches your product catalog by name, SKU, and quantity from each row, automatically matching the right products.
quote.step3_desc: All items are organized into a price quote table, in-stock and shortage items are flagged, and a PDF file is generated.
quote.demo_msg_user1: Hi, I'd like a quote for this list

ocr.desc: When a customer or your own employee photographs a receipt and sends it via Messenger or Telegram, AI reads it automatically and converts the amount, date, and other details into an Excel report.
ocr.step1_desc: Send the receipt photo through Messenger or Telegram. Both Mongolian and Latin script receipts are supported.
ocr.step2_desc: AI recognizes and extracts the store name, date, prices, total amount, tax ID, and all other information.
ocr.step3_desc: Every receipt is automatically logged, and Excel reports organized by month or day are downloaded with one click.

compare.desc: We've quantified the advantages of an AI system compared to a traditional employee.

pricing.desc: All plans include a 3-day free trial

cta_band.title: "Your store never sleeps"
cta_band.desc: Set up in 10 minutes and start right away
